root_text.an5.172:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato upāsako avisārado agāraṁ ajjhāvasati.
root_text.an5.172:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato upāsako avisārado agāraṁ ajjhāvasati.
root_text.an5.172:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato upāsako visārado agāraṁ ajjhāvasati.
root_text.an5.172:2.3: Pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti …pe… surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā paṭivirato hoti.
root_text.an5.172:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato upāsako visārado agāraṁ ajjhāvasatī”ti.

translation_text.an5.172:1.1: “A lay follower living at home with five qualities is not self-assured.
translation_text.an5.172:1.3: They kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, lie, and consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an5.172:1.4: A lay follower living at home with these five qualities is not self-assured.
translation_text.an5.172:2.1: A lay follower living at home with these five qualities is self-assured.
translation_text.an5.172:2.3: They don’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, lie, or consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an5.172:2.4: A lay follower living at home with these five qualities is self-assured.”
